data.title: Azincourt Energy announces C$1M private placement
data.description:
• Azincourt Energy (TSXV:AAZ:CA) has launched a non-brokered private placement to raise gross proceeds of up to C$1M consisting of flow-through units offered at a price of $0.025.
  • Each FT unit will be comprised of one flow-through common share and one common share purchase warrant. Each Warrant will be exercisable at a price of $0.05 into one common share for a period of 36 months from the date of issue.
  • The gross proceeds of the offering will be applied to the drilling, exploration and development of the company's Harrier Project located within the Central Mineral Belt of Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: FlexShopper receieves Nasdaq delisting notice
data.description:
• FlexShopper (NASDAQ:FPAY) announced on Friday that it received a Nasdaq notice, advising the company that it has initiated a process to delist the company’s common stock from Nasdaq.
  • Unless the company requests a hearing to appeal the delisting process by October 21, 2025, trading of the company’s common stock will be suspended from Nasdaq at the opening of business on October 23, 2025, and will subsequently be removed from listing and registration.
  • The company said it does not intend to request a hearing.
  • According to Nasdaq’s notice, the delisting is a result of the company having not filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ended December 31, 2024, Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ended March 31, 2025, and Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ended June 30, 2025, with the Securities and Exchange Commission by October 13, 2025.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: PyroGenesis reprices and extends term of warrants
data.description:
• PyroGenesis (TSX:PYR:CA) said on Friday that up to 1.58M common share purchase warrants will be amended.
  • The warrants, which have an exercise price of $1.20, will currently expire on November 18, 2025. 
  • Commencing on November 3, 2025, the exercise price and expiration date of the warrants held by holders wishing to participate in this repricing will be reduced to $0.63 per share and will be extended until July 17, 2026. 
  • All other terms of the warrants will remain unchanged. 
  • The company has received approval for these amendments from the TSX, subject to satisfaction of customary conditions. The net proceeds from the exercise of the warrants will be used for general corporate purposes.

data.title: GreenFirst welcomes the restart of operations at one of its key customers
data.description:
• GreenFirst Forest Products (GFP:CA) said on Friday it welcomed the restart of operations at one of its key customers, Kap Paper.
  • The company said the resumption would provide greater stability for its business and support local communities, citing collaboration between federal and provincial governments to back Northern Ontario’s forestry sector.
  • ICLTF closed -5.45% at $1.56.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Murphy USA CFO steps down, Donald Smith named interim finance chief
data.description:
• Murphy USA (NYSE:MUSA)  announced Friday Chief Financial Officer Galagher Jeff has left the company effective October 14 and has been replaced on an interim basis by Treasurer and Chief Accounting Officer, Donald R. Smith, Jr.
  • Smith has been with the company since its 2013 spin-off from Murphy Oil Corporation (MUR), serving in various executive roles including Controller. He was named Treasurer in 2024.
  • Shares slipped into the red in after-hours trading after closing Friday's regular session with a gain of 2%.
